required_prerequisite: ERP concepts, record types, transaction vs master data
impact: Reference materials existed but were not aligned with live tasks.
recommended_scaffold: Create 2-week NetSuite basics path before customer artifacts.

required_prerequisite: Business model, system landscape, project scope
impact: Customer context appeared through live artifacts rather than staged briefings.
recommended_scaffold: One-page client context sheet per project.

impact: External systems appeared without stable source/target map.
recommended_scaffold: Create system map and data ownership table.

artifacts_observed: RMA notes, return decks, return data
impact: Return process appeared before full O2C basics were stable.
recommended_scaffold: Teach O2C first, then return as reverse flow.

required_prerequisite: Sales order structure, CSV import, field mapping
artifacts_observed: Upload templates, US SO manual, channel files
impact: New employee had to work with upload structures and manuals early.
recommended_scaffold: Sandbox upload exercise before live upload/manual work.

required_prerequisite: Source-of-truth, IDs, date/status mapping, exception rules
impact: Mismatch analysis required operational data quality judgment.
recommended_scaffold: Provide reconciliation checklist and ownership rules.

required_prerequisite: Item types, Units Type, Costing Method, External/Internal ID
recommended_scaffold: Item master mini-course and sandbox item creation.

required_prerequisite: Assembly item, BOM, revision, component list, effective dates
artifacts_observed: BOM template, BOM inquiry, BOM creation notes
impact: Multiple meanings of BOM were not sufficiently separated.
recommended_scaffold: BOM hierarchy diagram and versioned example.

required_prerequisite: BOM consumption, assembly build, inventory detail, stock ledger
impact: Transaction impact appeared before master data foundations stabilized.
recommended_scaffold: Step-by-step WO build lab with expected inventory effects.

required_prerequisite: Manufacturing routing, work center, labor/machine cost
impact: Routing introduced with BOM/WO rather than after them.
recommended_scaffold: Separate Routing module after WO basics.

required_prerequisite: Demand, supply, safety stock, lot sizing, lead time
impact: MRP result interpretation appeared as advanced analysis.
recommended_scaffold: Teach planning parameters before result analysis.

required_prerequisite: Vendor location, outsourced PO, outsourcing charge, backflush, WO build
recommended_scaffold: Teach standard manufacturing first, then outsourced scenario.

required_prerequisite: Subsidiary, legal entity, intercompany PO/SO, transfer pricing context
impact: Intercompany appeared before basic manufacturing flow was mature.
recommended_scaffold: Legal entity process map and scenario lab.

required_prerequisite: Weekly goals, review, expected deliverable, mentor comments
artifacts_observed: Point lessons, outputs, many self-study files
impact: Outputs existed but systematic progress review was unclear.

required_prerequisite: Credential handling, permission scope, training vs live access
impact: Access artifacts appeared among learning/project files.
recommended_scaffold: Separate credential vault and access training.
